title: cyclobalanopsis chungii
intro: Cyclobalanopsis chungii, also known as the Korean chestnut or Korean oak, is a species of evergreen tree native to the mountains of Korea and China. It is a type of deciduous tree belonging to the Fagaceae family. The medicinal properties of Cyclobalanopsis chungii include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant compounds, which contribute to its potential health benefits. Cyclobalanopsis chungii is often prepared in herbal teas, infusions, and decoctions to treat various health conditions, such as fever, cough, and digestive issues, and is also used to lower cholesterol and blood pressure.
